trending_videos.title: America's Newsroom
trending_videos.description: Bill Hemmer and Dana Perino cover current events happening around the nation and the world; guests pertinent to the news topics are interviewed, and viewer emails are also answered by the anchors and guests.

trending_videos.title: Disclosure Day | Official Trailer
trending_videos.description:
This summer everything will become clear. Disclosure Day in theaters 06.12.26.

If you found out we weren’t alone, if someone showed you, proved it to you, would that frighten you? This summer, the truth belongs to seven billion people. 
We are coming close to … Disclosure Day. 

Universal Pictures is proud to release a new original event film created and directed by Steven Spielberg. The film stars SAG winner and Oscar® nominee Emily Blunt (Oppenheimer, A Quiet Place), Emmy and Golden Globe winner Josh O’Connor (Challengers, The Crown), Oscar® winner Colin Firth (The King’s Speech, Kingsman franchise), Eve Hewson (Bad Sisters, The Perfect Couple) and two-time Oscar® nominee Colman Domingo (Sing Sing, Rustin).
 
Based on a story by Spielberg, the screenplay is by David Koepp, whose previous work with Spielberg includes the scripts for Jurassic Park, The Lost World: Jurassic Park, War of the Worlds and Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull. Combined, those films earned more

trending_videos.title: Houston Rockets at Denver Nuggets
trending_videos.description: The Houston Rockets face the Denver Nuggets at Ball Arena. Kevin Durant leads Houston against Nikola Jokic and the Nuggets. Denver looks to clinch the season series at home, while the Rockets seek to even the score tonight at Ball Arena.

trending_videos.title: Thrash | Official Trailer | Netflix
trending_videos.description:
When a Category 5 hurricane decimates a coastal town, the storm surge brings devastation, chaos and something far more frightening: hungry sharks. Directed by Tommy Wirkola and produced by Adam McKay (Don’t Look Up), the film stars Phoebe Dynevor, Djimon Hounsou and Whitney Peak. THRASH is only on Netflix, April 10.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/82650122

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

Thrash | Official Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

When a catastrophic hurricane slams a coastal town, stranded residents must survive rapidly rising waters swarming with ravenous sharks.

trending_videos.title: Official Launch Trailer | Crimson Desert
trending_videos.description:
Reclaim power. Reach beyond. The fight for Pywel begins on March 19, 2026 (GMT/PT) on PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, Xbox on PC, Steam, Mac and Epic Games Store.

Pre-load on PlayStation Store, Xbox Store, Microsoft Store, and Steam starts March 17 at 22:00 GMT / 15:00 PT.

Join Kliff the Greymane as he embarks across the continent of Pywel to rebuild what has been lost and to save the land from a looming threat. From vast wilderness and cities to ancient ruins and the mystery of the Abyss, explore the lands and forge your path through battles and discovery in this open-world action-adventure.
(The footage captured in this trailer was captured on PC.)

Pre-order Crimson Desert:
» Steam: https://pearlabyss.info/lteno
» PlayStation Store: https://pearlabyss.info/ps_store
» Xbox Store: https://pearlabyss.info/xbox_store
» Epic Games Store: https://pearlabyss.info/epic_store

About Crimson Desert  
Crimson Desert is an open-world action-adventure game developed by Pearl Abyss. A devastati

trending_videos.title: Big Ten Tournament: Northwestern vs. Indiana
trending_videos.description: The Wildcats (5-15) play the Hoosiers (9-11) in the Big Ten Tournament second round at the United Center. Forward Nick Martinelli leads the offense, averaging 22 points, while forward Tucker DeVries defends the home court from imminent attack.

videos: Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2: Showdown | Cinematic Trailer
gaming.insights: Gaming content, specifically involving popular franchises like Fortnite, continues to draw significant attention. Trailers and launch announcements are particularly effective at generating views.

videos: Big Ten Tournament: Northwestern vs. Indiana
sports.insights: Sports content is a major driver of engagement. There is a strong viewership for both international events (Italy vs. Mexico) and U.S. collegiate and professional sports.

videos: Malcolm in the Middle: Life's Still Unfair | Official Trailer | Hulu
entertainment.insights: Entertainment trailers from major streaming platforms like Hulu and Netflix are popular. There's a trend towards reboots and new releases that capitalize on nostalgia or established franchises.

news.insights: News content maintains a consistent audience, with potential for growth in political or breaking news segments.

videos: One of These Cups Has a Spider Under it...
viral/challenge.insights: Challenge or viral content remains popular, appealing to viewers' curiosity and interest in surprising or humorous content.

top_channels.name: Fortnite
top_channels.insights: Channels with strong brand recognition and dedicated fanbases, like Fortnite, consistently perform well.

top_channels.name: FS1
top_channels.insights: Sports networks like FS1 are leveraging live events and analysis to capture sports fans.

top_channels.name: Hulu
top_channels.insights: Streaming services like Hulu use trailers to promote upcoming releases, tapping into both nostalgia and new content.

top_channels.name: FOX News
top_channels.insights: News channels maintain relevance through consistent coverage of current events, appealing to viewers seeking timely information.

top_channels.name: Universal Pictures
top_channels.insights: Major film studios utilize YouTube for trailer releases, creating buzz around upcoming films.

market_opportunities.gaming: Invest in the creation of cinematic trailers and gameplay teasers for new game releases or updates to capture the gaming audience.
market_opportunities.sports: Expand content around lesser-covered sports or niche tournaments to tap into underserved sports fans.
market_opportunities.entertainment: Develop content that capitalizes on nostalgia or beloved franchises to engage audiences familiar with the original works.
market_opportunities.news: Focus on creating targeted news segments that cover underreported stories or provide unique perspectives on current events.
market_opportunities.viral/challenge: Create interactive or challenge-based content that encourages viewer participation and sharing to leverage viral potential.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
